summary: 2026-06-27 20:15:56 PDT: Reviewed `git diff 0a48403...HEAD`, `git log --oneline 0a48403..HEAD`, and `reviews/pluggable-reviewer.md`. The four promised fixes are substantively present, and `tests/reviewer_test.sh` passes, but the new AC7 guard can false-green in checkouts without a local `main` ref.

findings.title: AC7 whitelist silently skips when local main is absent
findings.claim: The new AC7 guard only enforces the whitelist if `git rev-parse --verify -q main` succeeds; otherwise it reports success at the skip path. On a story-branch checkout with only `origin/main` or another valid base ref, the scope check would pass without comparing the diff, so out-of-scope files could slip through despite AC7 promising a branch whitelist gate.
findings.suggestion: Resolve the base ref from `.claude/workflow.json` and accept `main` or `origin/main` before diffing; if this story file is being reviewed but no usable base ref exists, fail loudly instead of counting the check as ok.
